positive: A maximalist, highly detailed circular composition featuring a mystical celestial owl integrated with vibrant bioluminescent woodland foliage and constellations. The owl's silhouette should be dramatic and central. The style combines intricate Japanese woodblock print aesthetics (Ukiyo-e) with Art Nouveau natural motifs and modern psychedelic psychedelia. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, forest green, and glowing gold accents. The artwork must be perfectly symmetrical, centered, and designed for screen printing on apparel, emphasizing strong black outlines, clean negative space, and a striking, isolated visual impact. Rule of thirds composition, vector art quality, digital illustration, intricate pattern design.
